creator: kevans@freebsd.org
text: From the backtrace, it looks like MOD_LOAD is failing and so we MOD_UNLOAD it, but it's only partially initialized and we aren't expecting that. I suspect we should just drop all of the free stuff in wg_module_init() and let MOD_UNLOAD deal with it, though in wg_module_deinit() we also need to avoid calling osd_jail_deregister() if wg_osd_jail_slot == 0 (i.e. we didn't reach that far in initialization).
